---
title: "Paper Diagnostics: CV Leakage, Stability, DSEN"
author: "Auto-generated"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 6
)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

source(here("methods", "00_paths.R"))
```

```{r load-data}
cv_file <- file.path(paths$scratch, "cv_wrong_vs_right_results.Rda")
fs_file <- file.path(paths$scratch, "feature_stability_results.Rda")
dsen_file <- file.path(paths$scratch, "dsen_results.Rda")

stopifnot(file.exists(cv_file), file.exists(fs_file), file.exists(dsen_file))

load(cv_file)
stopifnot(exists("cv_results"))
cv_df <- cv_results %>% filter(status == "success")

load(fs_file)
stopifnot(exists("all_results"))
fs_list <- Filter(function(res) !is.null(res) && (is.null(res$status) || res$status == "success"), all_results)

load(dsen_file)
stopifnot(exists("dsen_results"))
dsen_df <- dsen_results %>% filter(status == "success")
```

# CV Leakage

## MSE Inflation Waterfall

```{r mse-waterfall}
infl_df <- cv_df %>%
  arrange(inflation_pct) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

ggplot(infl_df, aes(x = rank, y = inflation_pct)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = inflation_pct > 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "steelblue", "TRUE" = "firebrick"), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title = "MSE Inflation (Right vs Wrong CV)",
    subtitle = "Sorted by percent change; positive = correct CV increases error",
    x = "Drug (ranked)",
    y = "MSE increase (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Inflation vs Feature Overlap

```{r infl-vs-jaccard}
ggplot(cv_df, aes(x = jaccard, y = inflation_pct)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Feature Overlap vs MSE Inflation",
    subtitle = "Lower Jaccard corresponds to larger leakage impact",
    x = "Jaccard (wrong vs right selected features)",
    y = "MSE increase (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Feature Stability

## Feature Sharing Across Drugs (Correct CV)

```{r feature-sharing}
right_features <- unlist(lapply(fs_list, function(res) {
  names(res$bs_right$freq)[res$bs_right$freq > 0.5]
}))

feature_counts <- sort(table(right_features), decreasing = TRUE)

counts_df <- tibble(
  Feature = names(feature_counts),
  N_drugs = as.integer(feature_counts)
)

ggplot(counts_df, aes(x = N_drugs)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "darkgreen", color = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "How Shared Are Correct-CV Biomarkers?",
    subtitle = "Each feature counted once per drug (bootstrap freq > 0.5)",
    x = "# drugs selecting feature",
    y = "Feature count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r sharing-summary, echo=FALSE}
total_feats <- length(feature_counts)
singletons <- sum(feature_counts == 1)
shared_5plus <- sum(feature_counts >= 5)
cat(sprintf("Total unique features: %d; single-drug: %d (%.1f%%); ≥5 drugs: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            total_feats, singletons, 100 * singletons / total_feats,
            shared_5plus, 100 * shared_5plus / total_feats))
```

# DSEN vs EN

## Per-Drug Performance Change

```{r dsen-waterfall}
dsen_plot <- dsen_df %>%
  arrange(mse_reduction_pct) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number())

ggplot(dsen_plot, aes(x = rank, y = mse_reduction_pct)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = mse_reduction_pct > 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray40", "TRUE" = "darkorange"), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title = "DSEN Change vs Standard EN",
    subtitle = "Positive = DSEN lower MSE",
    x = "Drug (ranked)",
    y = "MSE change (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r dsen-top-table}
top_gain <- dsen_df %>%
  arrange(desc(mse_reduction_pct)) %>%
  select(drug, mse_reduction_pct, mse_standard, mse_dsen, n_tissues) %>%
  head(10)

top_loss <- dsen_df %>%
  arrange(mse_reduction_pct) %>%
  select(drug, mse_reduction_pct, mse_standard, mse_dsen, n_tissues) %>%
  head(10)

knitr::kable(top_gain, digits = 3, caption = "Top 10 DSEN Improvements")
knitr::kable(top_loss, digits = 3, caption = "Top 10 DSEN Regressions")
```
